title: Second amendment extends revolving credit facility maturity
summary: The issuer entered into a second amendment to its revolving credit agreement extending maturity and temporarily increasing its maximum net leverage ratio threshold.

covenant_changes: Maximum net leverage ratio increased for fiscal quarters ending June 30, 2026 through December 31, 2026.

sources.excerpt: On April 9, 2026, Example Holdings, Inc. entered into a Second Amendment to its Revolving Credit Agreement.
The Revolving Credit Maturity Date is hereby amended to June 30, 2029, and the maximum net leverage ratio shall be increased for specified 2026 quarters.

extraction_notes: Key amendment terms were identified across the 8-K body and Exhibit 10.1. Additional agreement details may require manual review.
